programs.title: Power & S3 - "Yabusame - Michael No"
programs.desc: Australian Michael No, who lives and works in Japan, trains at a 900 year old Yabusame school and performs traditional horseback archery during a shinto ritual.

programs.title: Power & S3 - "MMA Ballet – George Birkadze"
programs.desc: George Birkadze from Tblisi, Georgia, practices and teaches Mixed Martial Arts but is also a world famous ballet dancer, instructor and choreographer in based in Boston, U.S.A.

programs.title: The New Frontier S1 - "From There To Here"
programs.desc: The first phase of this journey is complete, now commences the second, with robotics, advanced technologies and sheer daring we are now going where before we only dreamt.

programs.title: The New Frontier S1 - "Return To The Moon"
programs.desc: Few have walked on the moon's surface, though her allure remains strong, once again we are glancing her way with renewed interest and with a view to return very soon.

programs.title: The New Frontier S1 - "The Inner Worlds"
programs.desc: Venus the first and brightest star in the evening sky, and Mercury fleeting across the solar disk. As we begin to take a closer look at our companions they are posing more questions than answers.

programs.title: The New Frontier S1 - "Next Stop Mars"
programs.desc: It has fired our imaginations for millennia, Mars, the God of War and the source of Man's science fictional demise. It is the only other place in our solar system than Man might one day call home.
